Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Laos View the Laos chapters in our annual reports > Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Laos remain poor. The government uses Decree 315 to deprive the religious freedom of minority religious communities. Central and local governments use administrative regulations to hinder joining Buddhist religious orders and to prevent the construction of minority houses or worship. Source: Traditional lao village with temple stairs and mountain background near Vang Vieng, Laos, Shuttershock / Mazur Travel Recent News All Press Releases Op-Eds Speeches Spotlight #background-6591{background-image: url("/sites/default/files/2021-09/Laos%202021%20Fact%20Sheet_0.png");
